projects.name: Automated Threat Hunter
projects.description: Developed a custom Python-based threat intelligence tool that integrates with the VirusTotal API to automate hash, domain, and IP reputation lookups, streamlining incident triage.

projects.name: Industrial Data Enrichment Engine
projects.description: Built a local Python script using Pandas to clean, merge, and enrich raw industrial client datasets (over 200 companies) with industry metadata, making them fully compatible for direct import into Odoo ERP systems.

projects.name: Physics-Based Survival Mobile Prototype
projects.description: Designed and coded a top-down arcade survival driving game using Unity 6. Implemented strict physics-based vehicle mechanics where players must maintain a critical speed threshold to prevent a core failure state.

career_history.focus: Industrial workflow automation, metrics analysis, and pipeline performance optimization.
